title: Rach Gia、Kien Giang — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Rach Gia、Kien Giang的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Rach Gia是Kien Giang的一個城市，人口約250,000。A Mekong Delta port city and gateway to Phu Quoc Island, offering an extremely low cost of living and an authentic glimpse into delta life.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
